data.title: Stocks hit record highs; inflation at 3% in Sep 2025. S&P 500 up 1%, year-to-date gain at 15%. Ford jumps 10%.
data.description: Stocks on Wall Street reached record highs on Friday as lower-than-expected inflation figures increased expectations of a 25 basis points interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve at its upcoming Oct. 30 meeting. Annual headline inflation stood at 3% in September 2025, slightly higher than the previous month's 2.9% but below the anticipated 3.1%. Core inflation, excluding volatile food and energy prices, dropped from 3.1% to 3% year-over-year. The S&P 500 surpassed the 5,800 level with a 1% daily increase, pushing its year-to-date gain to 15%. Nearly all S&P 500 sectors saw gains except for energy, with the technology sector leading the way. The Dow Jones Industrial Average surged by 1.2% to 47,290, hitting a new high, while the Nasdaq 100 also rose by 1.2% to 25,370, marking another peak. Small-cap stocks performed exceptionally well, with the Russell 2000 skyrocketing by 1.7% to 2,520, nearing its all-time high of 2,560. Ford Motor Co. (NYSE: F) was... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Orion spacecraft assembled with SLS rocket for Artemis II Moon mission at Kennedy Space Center in 2025.
data.description: The Orion Integrity spacecraft has successfully docked with the SLS rocket at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida on October 24, 2025. This important step indicates readiness for a significant crewed mission to the Moon. The NASA Exploration Ground Systems team was responsible for joining and connecting the spacecraft and rocket. This marks a crucial milestone in preparation for the upcoming journey, which is set to involve a historic mission to the Moon.

data.title: UNITS sponsors NASCAR truck to promote Toys for Tots, reaching millions of children nationwide.
data.description: In Charleston, South Carolina on October 24, 2025, UNITS® Moving and Portable Storage revealed its ongoing national backing of the Marine Corps Toys for Tots program. The initiative, known for providing hope and holiday cheer to countless children annually, receives support from the company.

data.title: Zage and Lu propose to buy Grindr Inc. at $18/share, a 51% premium to current price. Los Angeles, Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: The offer put forward by George Raymond Zage III and James Fu Bin Lu, collectively known as the "Proposing Shareholders," presents a 51% premium compared to the original stock price. As of October 24, 2025, these shareholders, along with related entities, hold a total ownership exceeding 60% of the shares.

data.title: 70 Frost School of Music students performed at sold-out concert in NYC. Symphony Orchestra played "San Juan Hill: A New York Story" composed by Etienne Charles.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, the Frost Symphony Orchestra, led by Gerard Schwarz, performed "San Juan Hill: A New York Story" composed by Frost School Professor Etienne Charles. The event took place at Lincoln Center as part of the Legacies of San Juan Hill Festival in Coral Gables, Florida. This significant musical evening showcased the talents of the orchestra and celebrated the composition by Charles.

data.title: Tether's stablecoin division poised for a profitable year, forecasting $15B profit in 2025 amid growing market interest.
data.description: Tether, a leading stablecoin in the market, is forecasting a whopping $15 billion in profits by 2025. The company's strong position in the stablecoin sector is set to grow even further due to increasing investor interest and the rising adoption of digital dollars.

data.title: TOA Waters launches world's first Liquid Bath Bombs, revolutionizing bath experience. Bold self-care small business.
data.description: Get ready to say goodbye to traditional glitter balls as liquid bath bombs take the stage. TOA Waters, a progressive self-care company based in Frederick, Maryland, has recently launched the world's inaugural liquid bath bomb. Renowned for challenging gender norms and revolutionizing bath rituals, TOA Waters is making waves with this groundbreaking product. Introduced on October 24, 2025, this innovative creation is the first of its kind globally.

data.title: Inventor from Richmond, Va. develops new car wash vacuum attachment (RKH-495) to access hard-to-reach areas.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, an inventor from Richmond, Virginia shared their innovation of the CAR WASH VACUUM ATTACHMENT, aiming to improve accessibility in vehicles at self-serve car washes. This new attachment addresses the challenge of reaching difficult areas with the vacuum, providing a solution for users. The inventor's idea is poised to revolutionize the car wash experience, offering a more efficient way to clean vehicles. The device is projected to enhance the efficiency of car cleaning processes, potentially making car wash visits quicker and more thorough.

data.title: Sionna Therapeutics presents Phase 1 data for SION-719 and SION-451 NBD1 stabilizers at 2025 North American Cystic Fibrosis Conference; well-tolerated, meeting pharmacokinetic targets.
data.description: Phase 1 results of the novel NBD1 stabilizers, SION-719 and SION-451, revealed good tolerance and surpassed the desired pharmacokinetic goals.

data.title: Macy’s Board okays quarterly dividend payout.
data.description: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.6%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The economy added 250,000 jobs in various sectors, including healthcare, technology, and manufacturing. This positive trend has led to a boost in consumer confidence, with the stock market also responding favorably to the news. Analysts predict continued growth in the coming months, citing strong economic indicators and increasing demand in the job market. Overall, the latest data reflects a promising outlook for the country's economy.

data.title: Chainlink (LINK) price falls 35% from September high to $10M reserves, indicating potential downtrend ahead.
data.description: The value of Chainlink has experienced a significant 35% decline from its highest point in September, as indicated by CoinMarketCap. Even though reserves are increasing, technical analysis predicts additional drops in price.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield appoints Walid Cheaib as Vice Chair to Canadian Capital Markets Team.
data.description: In Toronto today, Cushman & Wakefield, a prominent real estate services company, revealed the appointment of Walid Cheaib as Vice Chair.

data.title: FIBRA Macquarie México's Q3 2025 highlights include 80% tenant retention rates, US$59.3M NOI, US$63.6M rental income, and sale of 180k sq ft property in Chihuahua.
data.description: FIBRA Macquarie México (FIBRAMQ) released its financial and operational outcomes for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2025. In the third quarter of 2025, key highlights included robust tenant retention rates of around 80.0% within both the industrial and retail sectors. There was a notable quarterly Net Operating Income (NOI) of US$59.3 million, marking a 4.5% increase Year-over-Year (YoY), propelled by a record rental income of US$63.6 million, up by 8.1% YoY. Moreover, a notable asset recycling activity was undertaken, involving the sale of a 180 thousand square feet vacant property in Chihuahua.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston reports $66.0 million net income for 2025 third quarter and declares dividend. Form 10-Q to be filed soon.
data.description: In Boston on October 24, 2025, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston released its initial, unaudited financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The report revealed a net income of $66.0 million for the quarter. The bank anticipates submitting its official quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the same period soon.

data.title: Dow hits new high after surprise CPI data, Ford leads S&P 500 with jumps. Solar company shines post-earnings.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant rally following the release of unexpected CPI inflation data. Ford saw a notable jump, leading the S&P 500 performance. The Dow reached a new high fueled by this surprising data. Additionally, a solar company showed strong performance after its earnings report, contributing to the overall positive atmosphere in the market. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: 212NYC club's 11th Gala in NY celebrates industry leaders with theme "Resilience Through Reinvention."
data.description: The 11th Annual Gala of 212NYC New York's Digital Advertising Club took place on October 23 with the theme "Resilience Through Reinvention." The event celebrated vision, leadership, and resilience. The Gala awarded trailblazers in the industry for their outstanding contributions. This year's event marked another successful gathering, showcasing the commitment and innovation of the digital advertising community.

data.title: M&T Bank Corp (NYSE: MTB) to present at BancAnalysts Assoc of Boston Conference on Nov 6.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, M&T Bank Corporation, trading under the ticker symbol MTB on the New York Stock Exchange, announced its participation in the upcoming BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference in Boston, MA. Representatives from M&T will be giving a presentation to investors and analysts on November 6.
